title: Le emissioni ammoniacali dagli allevamenti suinicoli: da problema a risorsa
subtitle: Cattura delle emissioni per un ciclo virtuoso dell’azoto nell’allevamento suino
description: Webinar presenting a technical project aimed at capturing ammonia emissions from pig farms to create a virtuous nitrogen cycle and reduce greenhouse gas emissions. It describes the Gas Loop initiative funded by the Emilia-Romagna Rural Development Program to implement air washing systems, produce recovered ammonium sulfate fertilizer, and enhance environmental and animal welfare outcomes.
